title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Ola Cabs Global Group are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ola Cabs Global Group:
Ola Cabs Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs Global Group!
